title: EventUtils
description: The best plugin to handle your Minecraft Events!
body:
## EventUtils - The best plugin to handle your Minecraft Events!
**Join my discord server for support or to report bugs!**
## Features
- Easy to use GUI to configure settings
- Simple config to edit settings without being online
- Many useful settings *(View below)* for all types of events
## Commands
- **/eventutils reload** - Reloads the config
- **/eventgui** - Opens the settings GUI
## Settings
**Suggest more settings you want added in my discord!**
- **PvP** - Allows players to hit other players [`true = enabled, false = disabled`]
- **Name Tag Visibility** - Shows player's names above their heads [`true = shown, false = hidden`]
- **Health Visibility** *(Requires Name Tag Visibility)* - Shows player's health under their nametag [`true = shown, false = hidden`]
- **Heal All** - Fills the health of all players to full
- **Feed All** - Fills the hunger bar of all players to full
- **Clear All** - Clears the inventories of all players, excluding you
- **Glowing** - Applies the glowing effect to all players [`true = glowing, false = not glowing`]
- **Spectators** - Sets player's gamemodes to spectator on death [`true = enabled, false = disabled`]
- **Death Lightning** - Spawns a lightning effect at dead players [`true = enabled, false = disabled`]
- **Chat** - Disables typing for all players who do not have op [`true = enabled, false = disabled`]
- **End Crystal Explosions** - Disables the explosions on end crystals [`true = explodes, false = does not explode`]
- **TNT Minecart Explosions** - Disables the explosions on tnt minecarts [`true = explodes, false = does not explode`]
- **Ender Pearls** - Disables throwing ender pearls [`true = usable, false = unusable`]
- **Wind Charges** - Disables throwing wind charges [`true = usable, false = unusable`]
- **Tridents** - Disables shooting/riptiding with tridents [`true = usable, false = unusable`]
- **Shields** - Disables blocking with shields [`true = usable, false = unusable`]
- **Bows** - Disables shooting with bows [`true = usable, false = unusable`]
- **Crossbows** - Disables shooting with crossbows [`true = usable, false = unusable`]
- **Hunger** *(Will cause ∞ health regeneration)* - Disables the hunger meter going down [`true = enabled, false = disabled`]
- **Nether** - Disables entering the nether dimension [`true = open, false = closed`]
- **End** - Disables entering the end dimension [`true = open, false = closed`]
## Event GUI
![Event GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1f18863aebc939404002b02672a795dbab1c4d5.png)
## Simple Config

```
# The plugin's prefix
prefix: "&e&lᴇᴠᴇɴᴛᴜᴛɪʟꜱ &8»"

settings:
  # The PvP status. true = on, false = off
  pvp: true
  # The nametag visibility status. true = shown, false = hidden
  nametag-visibility: true
  # The health visibility status. true = shown, false = hidden
  health-visibility: false
  # The glowing status. true = glowing, false = not glowing
  glowing: false
  # The spectate on death status. true = enabled, false = disabled
  spectators: false
  # The lightning on death status. true = enabled, false = disabled
  death-lightning: false
  # The chat status. true = enabled, false = disabled
  chat: true
  # The end crystal explosion status. true = explodes, false = does not explode
  end-crystal-explosions: true
  # The tnt minecart explosion status. true = explodes, false = does not explode
  tnt-minecart-explosions: true
  # The ender pearl use status. true = usable, false = unusable
  ender-pearls: true
  # The wind charge use status. true = usable, false = unusable
  wind-charges: true
  # The trident use status. true = usable, false = unusable
  tridents: true
  # The shield use status. true = usable, false = unusable
  shields: true
  # The bow use status. true = usable, false = unusable
  bows: true
  # The crossbow use status. true = usable, false = unusable
  crossbows: true
  # The hunger status. true = enabled, false = disabled
  hunger: true
  # The nether status. true = open, false = closed
  nether: true
  # The end status. true = open, false = closed
  end: true
```
